---
title: "Bayesian Workflow book: Exercises"
date: 2026-02-26
date-modified: today
date-format: iso
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
---

## Data files for exercises

This page lists data files used in the exercises that are not already provided
in the case study directories. Exercise datasets that are included with case
studies are not repeated here.

### Chapter 5

- [Monks.csv](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_05/Monks.csv)

### Chapter 6

- [2008ElectionResult.csv](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/2008ElectionResult.csv)
- [BMJSubmissions.csv](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/BMJSubmissions.csv)
- [pew_research_center_june_elect_wknd_data.dta](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/pew_research_center_june_elect_wknd_data.dta)
- [US-EST00INT-ALLDATA.csv](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/cdc/US-EST00INT-ALLDATA.csv)
- [births.txt](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/cdc/births.txt)
- [black_death_rates_from_1999_to_2013_by_sex.txt](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/cdc/black_death_rates_from_1999_to_2013_by_sex.txt)
- [deaton.txt](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/cdc/deaton.txt)
- [white_hisp_death_rates_from_1999_to_2013_by_sex.txt](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/cdc/white_hisp_death_rates_from_1999_to_2013_by_sex.txt)
- [white_nonhisp_death_rates_from_1999_to_2013_by_sex.txt](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_06/cdc/white_nonhisp_death_rates_from_1999_to_2013_by_sex.txt)

### Chapter 7

- [Achehunting.csv](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_07/Achehunting.csv)
- [incentives_data_clean.txt](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_07/incentives_data_clean.txt)

### Chapter 8

- [nba2023.txt](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_08/nba2023.txt)

### Chapter 11

- [naes04.csv](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_11/naes04.csv)

### Chapter 13

- [cd4.csv](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_13/cd4.csv)

### Chapter 27

- [US-2000-2014-SSA.txt](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_27/US-2000-2014-SSA.txt)
- [clean_cdc_birth_data.csv](http://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/blob/main/exercises/chapter_27/clean_cdc_birth_data.csv)
